US 30-Year Bond Auction

US 30-Year Bond Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.370 (Forecast -, Previous 2.330)
UKG again named HCM leader for 14th year, highlighting AI-powered UKG Pro® suite, with UKG BryteTM AI Agents.
news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, and Weston, Florida, UKG, a prominent provider of HR, payroll, and workforce management solutions, revealed that they have been recognized as a Leader in the Nucleus Research HCM Technology Value Matrix report for the 14th year in a row. The latest report for 2025 emphasized UKG Pro®, powered by AI, applauding ongoing advancements and new features like the introduction of UKG BryteTM AI Agents as factors propelling UKG's consistent leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Jeeva.ai introduces groundbreaking feature Signals for sales automation, promising dynamic prospecting with Agentic AI.
news.summary: A company based in Santa Monica, California, Jeeva.ai, known for its innovative sales automation solutions, is set to introduce a new feature called Signals. This groundbreaking feature will provide AI agents equipped with Agentic AI direct access to Signals, allowing them to easily search, analyze, and implement outreach strategies with exceptional precision. This development aims at revolutionizing sales outreach by incorporating dynamic innovation through features like Dynamic Prospecting, which automatically updates prospect lists to reflect current market trends.

news.headline: US 30-Year Bond High Yield Actual 4.623% (Forecast -, Previous 4.748%)
Verdek is revolutionizing border security in Virginia with fully charged patrol vehicles. #greenenergy #innovation
news.summary: In Monroe, Connecticut, on March 13, 2025, as the scorching summer sun emerges over the Virginia outposts of the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), a patrol vehicle is seen in action. This vehicle, previously dependent on traditional fuel methods emitting harmful fumes, now smoothly comes to life in silence - powered by full electricity, completely functional, and prepared for its duties.

news.headline: Events.com has acquired Temecula Valley Balloon & Wine Festival. Camping reservations now open, with performer lineup and event schedule to follow. Acquisition strengthens Events.com's presence in Southern California.
news.summary: Individual festival tickets are now available for purchase as camping reservations open up. The performer lineup and event schedule will be announced shortly. This strategic investment has broadened Events.com's live experiences portfolio and boosted its presence in Southern California. The acquisition highlights their dedication to expanding their offerings in the region.

news.headline: TRC Companies, Inc. receives A- grade for climate disclosure from CDP for second consecutive year.
news.summary: In Windsor, Connecticut on March 13, 2025, TRC Companies, Inc. achieved an impressive A- rating from CDP, formerly known as...TRC is a leading global professional services firm that offers integrated strategy, consulting, engineering, and applied technologies to support the energy transition. The high score further solidifies TRC's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Boulder Scientific Company invests in facilities to support polyolefins, electronics, aerospace & defense sectors.
news.summary: Boulder Scientific Company (BSC) located in Boulder, Colorado, revealed on March 13, 2025, the finalization of a series of investments in its manufacturing facilities in Mead and Longmont, Colorado. These investments aim to bolster support for clients in the polyolefins, electronics, aerospace, and defense industries. The advancements in technology and infrastructure will enhance the company's ability to meet the growing demands of its customers across sectors.

news.headline: Intel's stock rose with new CEO Lip-Bu Tan but challenges loom; Wall Street reacts positively.
news.summary: Investors on Wall Street reacted favorably to the announcement of Lip-Bu Tan as the new CEO of Intel. The stock saw a rise in response to this news. However, despite this initial positive reaction, Intel's stock is expected to encounter challenges in the future.

news.headline: Vallourec is a French company with a share capital of €4,761,692.46 and is registered in Meudon, France.
news.summary: VALLOUREC is a French limited liability company, operating as a société anonyme, with a Board of Directors and a share capital totaling €4,761,692.46. The company is headquartered at 12, rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France, and is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under number 552 142 200.

news.headline: Inventor from Texas creates THE MANDO CHEST BOOSTER cooler stand for easier access to food & beverages.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Corpus Christi, Texas, shared plans for a unique cooler stand. The inventor explained that they created THE MANDO CHEST BOOSTER to facilitate easier access to food and drinks within a cooler. This innovative design elevates the cooler...

news.headline: Dow Jones fell 3.5%, but Nvidia and Boeing surged amidst the decline; Boeing stock predicted to rise 50% by analysts.
news.summary: This week saw a 3.5% decline in the Dow Jones Industrial Average, with Nvidia and Boeing being notable exceptions as they saw gains. Analysts are optimistic about Boeing, predicting a 50% rise in its stock. The overall market trend was negative, but these two companies stood out with positive performances.

news.headline: Upcoming Tesla 'affordable' EV to be stripped-down Model Y per China media. Stock fell.
news.summary: According to reports from Chinese media, the next Tesla electric vehicle marketed as "affordable" will actually be a more budget-friendly version of the existing Model Y, rather than a completely new vehicle design. As a result of this news, Tesla's stock experienced a decline.

news.headline: Treasury WI 30 Yr yield 4.612% before $22 bln auction.
Trump: I inherited egg price problems.
Chicken Salad Chick opens 37th Texas location in Pflugerville on March 25, offering free chicken salad for a year.
news.summary: A popular fast casual chicken salad restaurant chain is set to mark the inauguration of its 37th location in Texas on March 25. This special event will feature a giveaway of free chicken salad for an entire year. The restaurant, known as Chicken Salad Chick, stands out as the sole fast casual establishment in the United States dedicated solely to chicken salad.

news.headline: LINGO introduces space-themed STEM kits, inspiring 10,000+ users. Founder preps for historic all-female Blue Origin flight.
news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia called LINGO has created STEM lesson kits aimed at motivating future professionals in the fields of Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics. These kits offer users the opportunity to experience a simulated rocket launch countdown and also develop prototypes for an earth sensing satellite. Since its inception, LINGO has successfully inspired over 10,000 individuals through these innovative kits.

news.headline: John A. Squires of Dilworth Paxson nominated by Trump to lead USPTO, founded in 1836, granted patents.
news.summary: Philadelphia, on March 13, 2025, Dilworth Paxson LLP announced partner John A. Squires' nomination by President Donald Trump to lead the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office. Established in 1836, the USPTO has issued patents for various inventions throughout the years.

news.headline: SendCutSend now offers custom manufacturing with a turnaround time of 48 hours, aiming to make U.S. manufacturing fast and affordable.
news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, as of March 13, 2025, SendCutSend has been dedicated to revolutionizing American manufacturing since 2018. The company strives to provide fast, affordable services without compromising quality. Noteworthy is their recent achievement of reducing turnaround time by 50% through the introduction of their Expedite Service. This improvement reflects their commitment to efficient and effective manufacturing solutions.

news.headline: ECB: Awareness of Digital Euro up, but interest in using remains low. Poll of 19,000 shows preference for current payment methods.
news.summary: A survey conducted across 11 European Union countries, reaching 19,000 households, discovered that a significant number of individuals are content with the payment options they currently utilize.

Trump: The EU and China are treating us very badly.
RUBIS reports robust cash flow in 2024, marks another successful year.
Trump: Facebook is going to invest $60 bln by end of year.
Trump: Shutdown might lead to very, very high taxes.
Trump: A Government shutdown could delay the tax bill.
Rove named one of top-ten cannabis companies to work for in 2025 by Cannabis Business Times.
news.summary: A company headquartered in Costa Mesa, California, has recently been recognized as one of the top cannabis companies to work for in 2025. Rove has secured a place among the top ten best cannabis companies to work for. The announcement was made by Cannabis Business Times, a prominent publication. This recognition is part of an annual program that identifies the best workplaces in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Pro Audio Equipment market to hit $6231.1M by 2029. Boosted by wireless microphones & live performance demand.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of March 13, 2025, the Pro Audio Equipment Market is categorized based on type into Wireless Microphones, Mixers, Conference System, Wired Microphones, Ceiling Array Microphones, and Content Creation Microphones. These products are utilized in both professional audio settings and consumer environments. The global market for Pro Audio Equipment is experiencing significant segmentation with various types of equipment serving specific purposes.

news.headline: Tennessee Association of Dance hosts virtual dance-off for cash prize in first-ever competition.
news.summary: Attention all dancers in Tennessee! The Tennessee Association of Dance (TAD) is hosting their inaugural virtual dance contest, "Tennessee's Favorite Dance." This exciting event offers participants the chance to showcase their moves for cash prizes and glory. The competition is set to take place in Nashville on March 13, 2025. Don't miss this opportunity to strut your stuff and potentially win big! Join the TAD in celebrating dance and talent.

news.headline: World Wide Technology acquires Softchoice Corporation for C$24.50 per Share, completing the acquisition plan.
news.summary: Softchoice Corporation, listed as SFTC on the TSX, has been acquired by World Wide Technology Holding Co. LLC (WWT) for C$24.50 per share. The acquisition was carried out by WWT's affiliate, 2672989 Alberta ULC. This announcement marks the completion of the acquisition through a plan of arrangement. Under this agreement, the Purchaser now holds all common shares of Softchoice.

news.headline: WWT completes acquisition of Softchoice to expand software & cloud capabilities globally.
news.summary: WWT, a worldwide technology solutions provider, has finalized the acquisition of Softchoice, a company specializing in software and cloud-based IT solutions. The acquisition brings together two industry leaders and marks a significant milestone for both companies. The deal underscores WWT's commitment to expanding its offerings and market reach. With this acquisition, WWT aims to enhance its capabilities in the software and cloud services sector. The specific financial details of the acquisition were not disclosed to the public.

Trump: NATO is stepping up.
Trump: I won't bend on Canada metals or April 2nd tariffs.
Dogecoin remains steady as top Solana cat coin surges on Robinhood addition; Popcat and others rise.
news.summary: Major meme cryptocurrencies are experiencing fluctuations as the overall market remains turbulent. While Dogecoin maintains stability, meme currencies like Popcat are witnessing an upsurge due to their recent listing on Robinhood.

news.headline: Trump: We don't need canada's cars, energy or lumber.
Profitability and growth strong in FY’24 despite currency impacts in Paris, France.
news.summary: Substantial increase in profit and strong organic growth were achieved in fiscal year 2024, even in the face of currency fluctuations. The positive financial results reflect a notable improvement in profitability and steady growth for the period. This success in profitability and growth is particularly noteworthy given the challenges posed by currency fluctuations throughout the year.

news.headline: Trump: Putin put out a very promising statement but it wasn't complete.
Trump: If Russia isn't there, it's disappointing for the world.
Fed bids for 30-year bond total $372.9 mln.
American Chemistry Council celebrates 40 years of Responsible Care® program in Canada, partnership with industry.
news.summary: In 2025, the industry stewardship program will reach its 40th anniversary since its launch. This week in Washington, the American Chemistry Council (ACC) hosted Canadian counterparts to celebrate their longstanding partnership. The ACC and Canadian chemical industry leaders came together to collaborate and further strengthen their alliance.

news.headline: Carolina biologist Jeffery L. Dangl wins Wolf Prize in Agriculture for his plant immune research.
news.summary: Jeffery L. Dangl, a biologist at UNC-Chapel Hill, has conducted groundbreaking research on plant immune systems, resulting in the development of innovative strategies to combat a wide range of plant diseases. This achievement was recognized on March 13, 2025, when Dangl, along with two other researchers, received a prestigious award for their work. This breakthrough has the potential to significantly impact agriculture and food security by providing effective methods to address plant diseases.

news.headline: Inventor from Aurora, Colo. creates MAGNETIC PLUS for easier glucose testing, helping diabetics, article on PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Aurora, Colorado, shared that they had created the MAGNETIC PLUS to revolutionize glucose testing for people with diabetes. The inventor expressed their goal to make the process easier by eliminating the challenges of handling small strips.
